function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"requirements":[{"title":"Health check endpoint returns JSON status","description":"The API must expose a GET /healthz endpoint that returns HTTP 200 with a JSON object containing at minimum a 'status' field set to 'ok'. The response must include Content-Type: application/json. The endpoint must not require authentication.","acceptance_criteria":["the behavior specified by \"Health check endpoint returns JSON status\" is implemented and returns the described result","an automated test asserts \"Health check endpoint returns JSON status\""]},{"title":"Monitoring system scrapes health check endpoint","description":"The monitoring configuration must be updated to include /healthz as a scrape target. The scrape interval must be no greater than 30 seconds. The monitoring system must alert on two consecutive failed health checks.","acceptance_criteria":["the behavior specified by \"Monitoring system scrapes health check endpoint\" is implemented and returns the described result","an automated test asserts \"Monitoring system scrapes health check endpoint\""]}]}
